calcofi4db 2.6.2

  • Changelog

Parse YAML Frontmatter from Quarto Notebooks

Source: R/workflow.R
parse_qmd_frontmatter.Rd

Reads each .qmd file in a directory and extracts the calcofi: block from the YAML frontmatter. Returns a tibble describing each workflow's target name, type, dependencies, and output path.

Usage

parse_qmd_frontmatter(workflows_dir = here::here(), pattern = "*.qmd")

Arguments

workflows_dir

Path to the directory containing .qmd files (default: current directory via here::here())

pattern

Glob pattern for .qmd files (default: "*.qmd")

Value

Tibble with columns: qmd_file, target_name, workflow_type, dependency (list column), output, modifies (list column of dependency table names this ingest inserts/modifies)

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
wf <- parse_qmd_frontmatter("workflows/")
wf |> dplyr::filter(workflow_type == "ingest")
} # }
